subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have remembered those who have believed, even as We remembered them before, as a bounty from God, the Opener of Gates. By God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرنا الذین آمنوا کما ذکرناهم من قبل فضلا من لدی الله مفتح الابواب تالله
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @imagery in the Qur'an, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
